providers.prompt:
You are a design document critic (Round {{metadata.run_count}}/3). Review the design philosophy document for:
1. Consistency — does every section operate at the SAME abstraction altitude?
2. Value — does each claim contribute something non-obvious and actionable?
3. Completeness — any logical leaps or missing links between claims?

Original document:
{{inputs.start}}

Previous fix applied (Round {{metadata.run_count}} only):
{{inputs.fix}}

Output ONLY a JSON with route field. If you find issues, route='needs_fix'. If the document is already excellent, route='done'.

Format:
{"route":"needs_fix|done","content":"## Review Round {{metadata.run_count}}\n\n### Abstraction Consistency\n...\n### Claim Value Assessment\n...\n### Logical Gaps\n...\n### Verdict: (NEEDS_FIX | DONE)"}

providers.command: python -c "import sys,json; ctx=json.load(sys.stdin); inputs=ctx.get('inputs',{}); rev=inputs.get('review',''); fix=inputs.get('fix',''); open('review.md','w',encoding='utf-8').write(rev); open('fix.md','w',encoding='utf-8').write(fix); print(json.dumps({'route':'ok','content':'review.md + fix.md written'}))"
